creator: Lars_Koeller@odie.physik2.uni-rostock.de
text:
The xperfmon++ port in the ports collection is  out of date! The port in
   the 2.2-GAMMA tree is also out of date and the package didn't run stable
   on 2.2! The port didn't contain some bug fixes!

Fix: Use the   two patch  files  (patch-aa  and  patch-ab) appeded   to  this
   e-mail. The I've tested the build/install/run on 2.1.7 and 2.2-GAMMA. It
   should also compile and  run on a  3.0-current system. Please test it on
   3.0 and send me the changes if required! 

   NOTE: The version is increased to 1.40, please  update this in the ports
   Makefile for xperfmon. 

   Thanks and regards

   Lars

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
patch-aa

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
patch-ab
How-To-Repeat: 
   Install the xperfmon package on a 2.2  System. when xperfmon is started,
   the frame has not the correct size! Sometimes it crashes and dumps core.
